# Apex Growth Management

> Apex Growth Management is a web design and SEO agency based in Raleigh, North Carolina. We build fast, professional websites for local service businesses and provide ongoing SEO, hosting, and maintenance.

## About

Apex Growth Management was founded by Walker Norris and Jack Francis in Raleigh, NC. We specialize in building high-performance websites for local service businesses — HVAC companies, plumbers, restaurants, contractors, landscapers, and more.

Our mission is to help small businesses compete online with enterprise-level websites at affordable prices.

## Services

- **Website Design**: Custom, mobile-responsive websites built with modern technology (Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS). Sites are fast, accessible, and optimized for conversions. Starting at $1,000.
- **SEO Optimization**: On-page SEO, technical SEO audits, keyword research, Google Business Profile management, and monthly performance reporting. We help local businesses rank higher in Google Search and Google Maps.
- **Website Hosting**: Fast, secure hosting with 99.9% uptime, SSL certificates, daily backups, and 24/7 monitoring. Included in monthly retainer.
- **Website Maintenance**: Ongoing content updates, image swaps, layout adjustments, and design tweaks. We handle changes within 24 hours so business owners never touch code.

## Pricing

### One-Time Website Build
- Standard (4-page site): $1,000
- Pro (up to 8 pages): $1,500
- Premium (unlimited pages): $2,000

### Monthly Retainer
- Basic (hosting + maintenance): $149/month
- Growth (hosting + SEO + reporting): $249/month
- Premium (full-service management): $399/month

No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime with 30 days notice. You own your website, domain, and all content.

## Location

- City: Raleigh, North Carolina
- Service Area: Nationwide (remote-first), with a focus on North Carolina local businesses
- Phone: (919) 744-0504
- Email: admin@apexgrowthmanagement.com
- Website: https://apexgrowthmanagement.com

## Technology Stack

We build all client websites using:
- Next.js (React framework)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Vercel (hosting and deployment)
- Sanity CMS (blog and content management)
- Cloudflare (DNS and security)

## Key Differentiators

1. **Speed**: Most websites are delivered within 2-3 business days
2. **No Lock-In**: Month-to-month contracts, you own everything
3. **Modern Tech**: We use the same technology stack as Fortune 500 companies
4. **Local Focus**: We understand the needs of local service businesses
5. **Full Service**: Design, hosting, SEO, and maintenance — all in one place
6. **Transparent Pricing**: No hidden fees, no surprise charges

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How long does it take to build a website?
A: Most sites are designed, built, and ready for review within 2-3 business days after receiving your content.

Q: Do I need to provide my own hosting?
A: No. Hosting is fully managed and included in your monthly retainer.

Q: Can I update the website myself?
A: You can, but most clients send us changes and we handle them within 24 hours.

Q: What if I want to cancel?
A: Cancel anytime with 30 days written notice. We transfer your website files and domain at no cost.

Q: Do you work with businesses outside of Raleigh?
A: Yes. We work with local service businesses across the country. Everything is handled remotely.

Q: How much does a website cost?
A: One-time build starts at $1,000. Monthly hosting and maintenance starts at $149/month.
